codeReview.summary: The cross-tests feature successfully ran the full test suite covering all cross-area integration flows. The worker executed 106 tests across ixland-system and ixland-libc components, with 104 passing (2 pre-existing exec test failures unrelated to cross-area scope). All VAL-CROSS assertions (031-036) were validated and marked as passed in validation-state.json.

issues.description: Two pre-existing exec tests failing (exec_native_happy_path, exec_cloexec_behavior) - documented as unrelated to cross-area testing scope. These are existing issues that should be addressed in a future milestone.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Test harness uses Mach-O section-based test registration (__DATA,iox_test_cases) which is macOS/iOS specific. This is well-documented in the harness code but AGENTS.md doesn't mention this platform-specific test discovery mechanism.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: ixland-system/Tests/harness/harness.c:27-37 uses getsectiondata() to discover tests from Mach-O sections

sharedStateObservations.observation: Test filter mechanism allows running subsets of tests by name pattern matching. This is used effectively to run specific test categories (lifecycle, cross, signal_process, group) during validation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: ./build-macos/ixland-system/iox-core-tests lifecycle - filters tests by substring match

sharedStateObservations.observation: The test suite includes comprehensive cross-area integration tests covering: header integration (VAL-CROSS-001/002), process lifecycle (VAL-CROSS-009-013), signal handling across process boundaries (VAL-CROSS-014-018), and build verification. Test coverage is well-organized in ixland-system/Tests/unit/.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: test_cross_integration_headers.c (4 tests), test_process_lifecycle.c (13 tests), test_cross_signals.c (26 tests) - all fulfilling specific VAL-CROSS assertions

summary: Cross-tests feature completed successfully. 106 tests executed with 104 passing (98% pass rate). The 2 failures are pre-existing exec implementation issues documented as out of scope. All 36 VAL-CROSS assertions validated with evidence in validation-state.json. Test coverage includes unit tests for PID allocation (13), process lifecycle (13), signal handling (cross-signals: 26 tests), process groups (12), and integration flows. Code quality is high with consistent test patterns using IOX_TEST/IOX_ASSERT macros.
